title: Advanced Enchants
description: Advanced Enchantments adds 12 custom enchantments to Minecraft 1.20.1 — including Lifesteal, Treecapitator, Vein Miner, Homing arrows, Double/Triple Shot, Evasion, and more — each fully configurable in-game.
body:
--- # ✨ Advanced Enchantments A Fabric mod for **Minecraft 1.20.1** that adds **12 powerful custom enchantments** — each fully configurable in-game. Toggle them on/off, control enchanting table availability and rarity, manage villager trades, and customize which loot chests they spawn in, all without touching a config file. --- ## 🔧 In-Game Config Open the config screen via **ModMenu** to: - Enable or disable any enchantment - Toggle whether it appears at the **enchanting table** (and set its rarity) - Enable or disable **villager trades** for it - Edit **loot table entries** — which chests, what level, and what chance --- ## ⚔️ Enchantments
Lifesteal — Weapons ![Lifesteal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6df2fbe15af6bc09ee6f03f2a0288e5ce16c2f56.gif) Heal for a portion of the damage you deal to enemies. Found in Woodland Mansion chests.
Replant — Hoe ![Replant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541649f81e99905b5bdbc7c5bc17e644edf16988.gif) Automatically replants crops after harvesting them. Enchantable. Sold by Farmers.
Magnetic — Sword / Tool / Bow ![Magnetic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e17ae1f5758939434a517ce13dc24198bce7ec86.gif) Pulls nearby items and XP orbs directly into your inventory. Enchantable. Found in End City and Stronghold chests.
Flame Walker — Boots ![Flame Walker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0655bf58c69d12686323031a510b8189230f787e.gif) Walk across lava by converting it to temporary obsidian beneath your feet. Found in Nether Fortress and Bastion chests.
Experience — Any ![Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb7e7d4947cf3faf43928da3babe382d5129c74.gif) Grants bonus XP when killing mobs or mining. Enchantable. Found across most loot chests.
Treecapitator — Axe ![Treecapitator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c835a22b999596faf3424e0aaacc8f7a2d0d01.gif) Fells an entire natural tree in one swing. Found in Woodland Mansion chests. Sold by Wandering Traders.
Vein Miner — Pickaxe ![Vein Miner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82691bb9798ec3d674e644c7e3d134544bf4274e.gif) Mines an entire ore vein at once (up to 64 blocks). Found in Mineshaft and Ancient City chests.
Auto Smelt — Pickaxe / Axe / Shovel ![Auto Smelt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366cee088516a8533454d357632856fa2378d3c4.gif) Automatically smelts mined blocks as they drop (80% Chance to succeed). Found in Nether Fortress, Bastion, Mineshaft chests, and Piglin bartering.
Double Shot — Bow ![Double Shot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e8dd33266f441ee467a45ac71db52adbc6fd1d.gif) Fires a second arrow alongside your shot. Enchantable. Sold by Fletcher villagers.
Triple Shot — Bow ![Triple Shot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c2d84b605340edc669a1a33548b07a415f978d.gif) Fires two extra arrows alongside your shot. Found in End City chests.
Homing — Bow ![Homing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb8958e9b2bbee1da8486a2040434cd6e391ef7.gif) Arrows curve toward the nearest enemy in your crosshair within 24 blocks. Fully compatible with Double Shot and Triple Shot — each arrow deals full damage. Found in Stronghold chests. Sold by Fletcher villagers.
Evasion — Armor ![Evasion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8fb517fc19ab7ec556181aa9b30ec57d22caeb3.gif) Each armor piece with Evasion gives a 1% chance to completely dodge an incoming hit. Stack up to 4 pieces for 4% total evasion chance. Enchantable. Found across most loot chests.
--- ## 🔁 Compatibility - Works with [**Wearable Quivers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wearable-quivers) — Double/Triple Shot respects quiver arrow counts - Requires [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [**ModMenu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) recommended for in-game config ---
